title: meliosma seleriana
intro: Meliosma seleriana, also known as the 'Seler's meliosma' or 'Tetradenia seleriana', is a species of flowering plant in the family Ixabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Meliosma seleriana include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Meliosma seleriana is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and alleviate various health conditions.
